#  Delete Budgeted Labor Hours and Budgeted Production Quantities for the Timesheets Tool 
##  Background 
If you want to delete budgeted labor hours and budgeted production quantities from the Unit Quantity Based Budget page, the steps you use will depend upon whether the project's Budget tool is enabled.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/timesheets-project/permissions)
  * For customers using Procore Project Financials who have enabled the 'Procore Labor Productivity Cost' budget view, deleting budgeted production quantities as described below will be reflected in the budget view. To learn about the budget view, see [Set Up the Procore Labor Productivity Cost Budget View](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/preview-the-budget-view).


##  Prerequisites 
  * If the Budget tool is enabled, users will need to first delete labor hours from the budget by deleting its corresponding budget line items. See [Delete a Budget Line Item](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/delete-a-budget-line-item) for more information.


##  Steps 
  * If Budget Tool is Disabled
  * If Budget Tool is Enabled


### If Budget Tool is Disabled
  1. Navigate to the project's **Admin** tool.
  2. Under "Project Settings", click **Unit Quantity Based Budget.**
  3. Locate the line item of budgeted labor hours and production quantities you want to delete.
  4. Hover to the far right of the line item to display the **trash bin** ![Icon Delete Trash](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/516e54ea0aa4258758d529172871e38f/b443eda53f8791b9421fb3aad5dee970/icon-delete-trash.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.  
![Delete Timesheet Quantities From Admin](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d423bf058a7ad8721fc02c195383d19a/584cf59a713768446333994855ce0060/delete-timesheet-quantities-from-admin.png?fm=webp)
  5. Click the **trash bin**![Icon Delete Trash](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/516e54ea0aa4258758d529172871e38f/b443eda53f8791b9421fb3aad5dee970/icon-delete-trash.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  6. Click **Delete Labor Hours** , **Delete Production Quantities,** or **Delete Both** in the “Delete Labor Hours and Production Quantities ” window.


### If Budget Tool is Enabled
_Note:_ You can only update or delete Labor Hours from the Budget tool. See [Delete a Budget Line Item.](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/delete-a-budget-line-item)
  1. Navigate to the project's **Admin** tool.
  2. Under 'Project Settings,' click **Unit Quantity Based Budget**.
  3. Locate the line item of budgeted labor hours and production quantities you want to delete.
  4. Hover to the far right of the line item to display the **trash bin** ![Icon Delete Trash](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/516e54ea0aa4258758d529172871e38f/b443eda53f8791b9421fb3aad5dee970/icon-delete-trash.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.  
  
![Delete Timesheet Quantities From Admin](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d423bf058a7ad8721fc02c195383d19a/584cf59a713768446333994855ce0060/delete-timesheet-quantities-from-admin.png?fm=webp)  

  5. Click the **trash bin**![Icon Delete Trash](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/516e54ea0aa4258758d529172871e38f/b443eda53f8791b9421fb3aad5dee970/icon-delete-trash.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  6. Click **Delete Production Quantities** in the “Delete Labor Hours and Production Quantities ” window.


## See Also
  * [Set Up a Labor Budget to Actual Report for the Timesheets Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/set-up-a-labor-budget-to-actual-report-for-the-timesheets-tool)
  * [What are Procore's standard budget views?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-procores-standard-budget-views)
  * [Which data columns are in a Field Production Report?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-data-columns-are-in-a-field-production-report)
title: Delete Budgeted Labor Hours and Budgeted Production Quantities for the Timesheets Tool
